subject: Two iron keys on a shared ring, lying on a wooden surface
description: Two old, corroded iron keys share a bent and looped key ring, resting flat on a wood-plank surface with a visible grain pattern. The larger key has a decorative bow set with small red gem-like eyes. Moss and green foliage creep in at the upper-left corner, suggesting the keys have been left somewhere overgrown. The setting is dim and close, the palette warm rust and brown with flickers of red and green.
foreground: Two iron keys on a key ring, resting on wood planks
background: Worn wooden surface with visible grain; green foliage at corner
emotion: ominous stillness; keys appear to have been deliberately placed
